title: Behind the News
writer: Isabel Dawn, Boyce DeGaw, Dore Schary
actors: Lloyd Nolan, Doris Davenport, Frank Albertson
plot: It's Jeff Flavin's first day on the job as a cub reporter for the Enquirer. The boss, Archer, places him with lazy reporter Stu Woodrow. Stu detests cubs and treats Jeff badly. Jeff saves a drunken Stu's job by covering convicted ...
